com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues

Class PStructDeque<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractStructRing<T>
          • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.dequeues.PStructDeque<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PStructDeque<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractStructRing<T>
    A growable native struct deque on a ring; elements are accessed through views, and any capacity change invalidates outstanding views.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructDeque(NativeAllocator allocator, StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
      PStructDeque(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory)
      Creates an empty deque with zero capacity on the system allocator.
      PStructDeque(StructLayout layout, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, long initialCapacity)
      Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T addFirst()
      Adds a zeroed element at the head and returns its view.
      T addFirst(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
      Adds an element at the head, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
      T addLast()
      Adds a zeroed element at the tail and returns its view.
      T addLast(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
      Adds an element at the tail, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
      void ensureCapacity(long requiredCapacity)
      Grows capacity to at least requiredCapacity.
      T peekFirst()
      Creates a view of the head element.
      T peekLast()
      Creates a view of the tail element.
      void removeFirst()
      Removes the head element, zeroing its slot.
      void removeLast()
      Removes the tail element, zeroing its slot.
      void trimToSize()
      Shrinks capacity to the current size.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractStructRing

        layout

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing

        clear

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructDeque

        public PStructDeque(StructLayout layout,
                    StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory)
        Creates an empty deque with zero capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views

      • PStructDeque

        public PStructDeque(StructLayout layout,
                    StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                    long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

      • PStructDeque

        public PStructDeque(NativeAllocator allocator,
                    StructLayout layout,
                    StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                    long initialCapacity)
        Creates an empty deque with the given starting capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        layout - the entry layout
        viewFactory - creates the entry views
        initialCapacity - the starting capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if initialCapacity is negative

    • Method Detail

      • ensureCapacity

        public void ensureCapacity(long requiredCapacity)
        Grows capacity to at least requiredCapacity.
        Parameters:
        requiredCapacity - the minimum capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if requiredCapacity is negative
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • trimToSize

        public void trimToSize()
        Shrinks capacity to the current size.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addFirst

        public T addFirst()
        Adds a zeroed element at the head and returns its view.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addFirst

        public T addFirst(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
        Adds an element at the head, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
        Parameters:
        initializer - fills the fresh element
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if initializer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addLast

        public T addLast()
        Adds a zeroed element at the tail and returns its view.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • addLast

        public T addLast(java.util.function.Consumer<? super T> initializer)
        Adds an element at the tail, initializes it, and returns its view; a throwing initializer rolls back.
        Parameters:
        initializer - fills the fresh element
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if initializer is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • peekFirst

        public T peekFirst()
        Creates a view of the head element.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • peekLast

        public T peekLast()
        Creates a view of the tail element.
        Returns:
        the view
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • removeFirst

        public void removeFirst()
        Removes the head element, zeroing its slot.
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • removeLast

        public void removeLast()
        Removes the tail element, zeroing its slot.
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
